agents.summary: Generated a repository-wide V4 architecture map and compatibility baseline.
Built a non-breaking extension inventory for legacy and TITAN modules.
Mapped classical OSINT modules and external wrapper families into the V4 pipeline fabric.
Promoted the TITAN SOCMINT pipeline to the V4 orchestration layer with 15+ mapped stages.
Composed dashboard data contracts for Flask and SPA surfaces without altering legacy routes.
Defined health-checkable queues, services, and repairable extension points for V4 operations.
Unified CLI, API, dashboard, workflows, data, and TITAN services into a single V4 manifest.

services.name: rtf-ai-engine
services.purpose: AI correlation engine for identity resolution, prioritization, and summarization.

services.name: rtf-automation-engine
services.purpose: Automation engine for reusable async task pipelines and workflow templates.

services.name: rtf-breach-engine
services.purpose: Breach intelligence engine for leak ingestion, credential exposure scoring, and downstream pivots.

services.name: rtf-casm-engine
services.purpose: Continuous attack surface management engine with discovery and drift tracking.

services.name: rtf-core
services.purpose: Shared orchestration plane for configuration, module dispatch, scheduler bridging, and CLI bootstrap.

services.name: rtf-credential-engine
services.purpose: Credential attack coordination engine for sprays, cracking, and reuse analysis.

services.name: rtf-graph-engine
services.purpose: Graph intelligence storage and relationship query layer for distributed investigations.

services.name: rtf-monitoring-engine
services.purpose: Observability engine for metrics, worker health, and execution telemetry.

services.name: rtf-osint-engine
services.purpose: OSINT collection mesh for search, enrichment, and normalization across passive sources.

services.name: rtf-report-engine
services.purpose: Reporting engine for graph-backed findings, executive summaries, and artifact bundles.

services.name: rtf-scraper-engine
services.purpose: Proxy-aware scraping engine for search, websites, and social artifacts.

services.name: rtf-socmint-engine
services.purpose: SOCMINT pipeline for persona fusion, recursive pivots, and timeline assembly.

services.name: rtf-worker-cluster
services.purpose: Distributed worker execution for compute-heavy jobs

services.name: rtf-ingestion-engine
services.purpose: Normalizes evidence into events, entities, and artifacts

cli: Add titan and engine subcommands without impacting legacy commands
api: Expose distributed service topology and queue status endpoints
dashboard: Add graph explorer, workflow monitor, live logs, and service health cards
workflow_engine: Register engine-driven pipelines through the existing workflow registry
module_system: Wrap architecture engines as BaseModule-compatible modules
reporting: Feed graph, AI, and evidence timelines into existing reporting engine
scheduler: Bridge local async jobs to queue-backed worker execution
configuration: Layer service topology and queue settings over current YAML/env config
